channel.title: Willesden Families — This Week in NW London
channel.description: What's on this week for families in Willesden Green, Queen's Park, Kensal Rise, and nearby NW London.

item.title: After School Dreams Summer Camp — Week 1
item.description: Mon 6 – Fri 10 Jul, Ladbroke Grove. Multi-activity camp with arts, sports, and outdoor play. Ages 4–12. ££. Book via website.

item.title: Kids Garden Club at Clitterhouse Farm
item.description: Fri 10 Jul, 16:00, Brent Cross. Free weekly gardening club at Our Yard. All ages. Hands-on with planting, growing, and nature.

item.title: Brent Libraries Summer Fun Festival
item.description: Now launched! Free summer programme at all Brent libraries including Willesden Green. Robotics, storytelling, arts & crafts. All ages.
